data.title: 国际服主线Vol.5 第二章 Part1更新
data.summary: [Main Story Announcement] Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2: 'To You, Who's Trying to Bloom
data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2: 'To You, Who's Trying to Bloom Alone' Part. 1 is coming soon, Sensei!

Please look forward to it!
